tagline: Design visuals that match real emotions.

designSystem.style: Modern emotional design tool with violet-purple gradient accent, soft lavender backgrounds, card-based layout with rounded corners, and a clean information hierarchy that prioritizes mood-driven content over decoration. Light mode defaults to airy lavender surfaces; dark mode uses deep indigo-blacks with glowing purple accents.

screens: Analyze — Text input screen where users paste a project description or sentence to trigger mood detection. Features example prompts, character count, and an animated analysis flow that outputs emotional scores (trust, energy, urgency, premium) with a visual breakdown.

Palette — Visual direction hub showing mood-matched color swatches, font pairings with live type previews, and spacing recommendations. Mood switcher lets users explore all 6 mood profiles. Each tab includes a design rationale explanation.

Preview — Format preview canvas rendering the generated design system across Social Post, Flyer, Web Banner, and Pitch Deck layouts using the actual palette and typography. Includes export and share CTAs.
Presets — Saved mood configurations displayed as cards with palette strip previews, format tags, and timestamps. Users can build a brand library of emotional design presets for recurring campaigns.
Settings — Account management, theme toggle (light/dark animated switch), mood engine tuning, notification preferences, and a design learning hub. Includes app version and user profile display.
moodProfiles: Calm & Reassuring — Cool blues, generous whitespace, serif fonts
Urgent & Bold — Red-orange high contrast, condensed type, compact spacing
Premium & Refined — Charcoal and warm gold, expansive layout, editorial serifs
Energetic & Playful — Multi-hue vibrant palette, rounded type, dynamic rhythm
Trustworthy & Professional — Deep navy, structured grid, traditional serifs
Reflective & Poetic — Muted purples, breathable layout, classical type
